LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No26_FirstEncounter.label: No.26 Tracks #0
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No7.label: No.7 — Corrosive Assault
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No13.label: No.13 — Hunt Aftermath
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No42.label: No.42 — Genetic Drift
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No45.label: No.45 — Through Fire
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No50.label: No.50 — Uninvited Guest
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No64.label: No.64 — Pirate Hunt
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_No88.label: No.88 — Fleeing the Flames
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_MatriarchCrash.label: Titan Legend: Matriarch of Life
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_MatriarchCrash.letterText:
A massive life energy signature has crashed nearby. It is the legendary "Matriarch of Life".

It appears extremely weak, on the verge of genetic collapse. Use Prototype #0 to cure it, and you may receive life's gift.

Warning: If you cannot cure it in time, it will return to the void.
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_WarlordRaid.label: Titan Legend: War Trace
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_WarlordRaid.letterText:
The air reeks of blood. The legendary tyrant "War Trace" has appeared with its berserk beast pack!

It is in an extreme rage. You can choose to defeat it, or use Prototype #0 to soothe its fury.

Either way, proving your strength will earn its recognition and a token of acknowledgment.
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_VoidWalkerRescue.label: Titan Legend: Void Walker
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_VoidWalkerRescue.letterTe:
Space warps unnaturally as a semi-transparent figure tumbles from a phase rift — it is the legendary "Void Walker". It is clearly being hunted; its phase field is damaged in multiple places.

It is on high alert and will not approach anyone easily. Clear all hostile units from the map, then use Prototype #0's Titan Resonance to communicate with it. You may earn its trust.

Warning: If threats remain nearby, it will attempt to phase-shift away again.
LanguageData.TITAN_Incident_HunterAttack.label: Hunter Assault
